case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. JOSE LUIS KOYOC CHAN

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) LUPE ACEVEDO, LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $50.00) SERVED JUL-09-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CHAN, JOSE LUIS KOYOC
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT CHAN, JOSE LUIS KOYOC
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT CHAN, JOSE LUIS KOYOC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-14-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-14-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-14-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, REPRESENTED BY LUPE ACEVEDO, LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JOSE LUIS KOYOC CHAN IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-14-2019 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHAN, JOSE LUIS KOYOC $1,800.00 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,900.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
